coreWorkflows.name: Intake + Triage
coreWorkflows.summary: Scopes requests into slices, acceptance criteria, and risk flags before implementation.

coreWorkflows.name: Feature Delivery
coreWorkflows.summary: Executes plan -> implement -> validate -> compound for vertical delivery slices.

coreWorkflows.name: TanStack + Vite Guardrails
coreWorkflows.summary: Applies frontend data/routing/forms/build guardrails for apps/web.

coreWorkflows.name: Architecture + ADR Guard
coreWorkflows.summary: Checks boundary/layer/runtime correctness and documents approved deviations.

coreWorkflows.name: PR Risk Review
coreWorkflows.summary: Findings-first pre-merge risk review for regressions, safety, and contract drift.

coreWorkflows.name: Test Surface Steward
coreWorkflows.summary: Balances required test depth and reliability across backend, API, worker, and web.

coreWorkflows.name: Security + Dependency Hygiene
coreWorkflows.summary: Audits auth/data safety, secret handling, and dependency risk.

coreWorkflows.name: Performance + Cost Guard
coreWorkflows.summary: Detects and prioritizes performance and cost regressions.

coreWorkflows.name: Docs + Knowledge Drift
coreWorkflows.summary: Keeps workflow/standards docs aligned with actual repository behavior.

coreWorkflows.name: Periodic Scans
coreWorkflows.summary: Runs recurring quality scans and routes findings into closure workflows.

coreWorkflows.name: Release + Incident Response
coreWorkflows.summary: Defines release go/no-go, canary/rollback thresholds, and incident handling loops.

coreWorkflows.name: Self-Improvement
coreWorkflows.summary: Converts repeated failures into stronger guardrails, tests, docs, and automation rules.

utilitySkills.name: Quality Closure Loop
utilitySkills.summary: Orchestrates scan -> triage -> fixes -> recurrence prevention -> closure.

utilitySkills.name: Code Simplifier
utilitySkills.summary: Improves readability while preserving behavior and guardrail compliance.

utilitySkills.name: Codebase Navigation
utilitySkills.summary: Locates canonical files and test targets quickly before implementation/review.

utilitySkills.name: Debug + Fix
utilitySkills.summary: Runs a test-driven reproduce -> isolate -> fix -> validate loop.
